[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Indoor Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/stands) 4. [Versatile Banner Stand with 24" x 72" Banner](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/versatile-banner-stand-24x72) 5. Versatile Banner Stand 24x72 Replacement Banner # Versatile Banner Stand 24x72 Replacement Banner Do you need to update the content on your Versatile Banner Stand 24x72? Get started on your replacement for your stand below. You can customize it for any occasion or location. We have lots of templates available for you to use. You can edit the banner template in the online designer by adding clip art, photos, text, and a background. * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Order Process](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6) * [Shipping](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7) Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity ## Choose Size Choose the size you want for your product Size (H x W): 72" x 24" 72" x 24" Qty: Step 2 - Choose Add-Ons ## Choose Options Choose the options you want for your product ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Step 3 - Choose Design Method ## Pick a Template All Templates Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ ### Three Ways to Order Replacements There are three ways you can order replacements online. 1. Pick a Template to Customize * Add a background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics 2. Upload a File * [Click here to visit our artwork specifications page](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs) 3. Let us Design * We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl replacement for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us ### Replacement Production Times At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it’s important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from 1 to 5 business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order. \*\*\* Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\* * 3 Day Standard: This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders. * 1 Day Priority: Combine Priority production with UPS overnight shipping for blazing fast delivery. * 2 Day Express: Have an extra day but still need it quickly? Express is for you. * 5 Day Saver: If you aren’t in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option. The time it will take to receive your product is production time plus shipping time. _Please contact one of our professional customer service representatives at (320) 391-5300 if you have any additional questions._ ### Payment Information All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your option
